brand.name: DigiSutra
brand.authLede: Sign in or create an account to enter a persistent dashboard for products and settings.
brand.footnote: The dashboard uses a single persistent shell after authentication.

home.title: Home
home.lede: A quick overview of what DigiSutra provides.

cards.title: Creator operations workspace
cards.body: DigiSutra is a dashboard for managing digital products such as courses, templates, downloads, and other catalogue items from one persistent workspace.

cards.title: What it provides
items: View catalogue rows with product status and ownership
Adjust API connection settings from the dashboard

cards.title: How to use it
items: Sign in or create an account
Use the sidebar to move between sections
Add products, review them, and save settings without leaving the app shell
